subcodes.first_line: O Thou Self-Sufficing One! Make Thy loved ones confidants of mysteries and fashion them as revealing mirrors, that they may raise up a melody and song throughout the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بی نياز ياران را محرم راز نما و آئينهء غماز کن تا در جهان نغمه و آوازی اندازند
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @humility; meekness; lowliness
